graph_id.description: Dependency-graph identifier shared by all tasks in one task frame

task_group_id.description: Research-management grouping for related tasks. Defaults to graph_id if omitted.

task_group_title.description: Human-readable title for the task group. Used for synthesis/status reporting.

hypothesis.description: The testable claim this experiment validates

instructions.description: Ordered steps for Codex to execute

validation_command.description: Shell command Codex should run after implementation to self-check

files_to_read.description: Files Codex should read for context before starting

timeout_minutes.description: Max wall-clock time before watcher kills the job. Choose per task; do not treat 60 minutes as a universal default.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must complete successfully before this task can run

conflict_keys.description: Write-domain locks; tasks sharing a conflict key are serialized

priority.description: Higher priority tasks are dispatched first when multiple are runnable

analyst_reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort for the analyst. Default to medium; reserve xhigh for unusually hard coordination, debugging, or synthesis.
